overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a first-person approach to a gothic castle entrance at night, transitioning from an exterior stone courtyard through large wooden doors into a grand hall featuring a bifurcated staircase and an ornate house crest, with students visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a gothic castle entrance at night, moving across a cobblestone courtyard toward large wooden doors flanked by warm lanterns. The stone facade features intricate carvings and creeping ivy, with a dark blue night sky visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with bifurcated staircase and house crest

events.description: passing through the wooden doors into the candlelit great hall with high ceilings
continuing forward through the hall as students walk up and down the side staircases

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall toward the large crest on the far wall, observing the architecture and students

student in dark robes descending the right staircase

grand stone staircase with ornate railings splitting to the right side
large ornate metal crest with central H letter and house symbols, flanked by burning torches
flaming torches on stone pedestals providing warm illumination
flaming torches on stone pedestals providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: Having entered the castle, the camera moves through a grand hall featuring a bifurcated staircase on either side and a massive ornate crest on the far wall. Students in dark robes walk up and down the staircases while flaming torches cast warm light on the stone walls and marble floor as the camera approaches the central crest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cold, moonlit exterior courtyard into the warm, imposing grandeur of a gothic castle hall. It begins by gliding across a cobblestone courtyard toward large wooden doors, passing intricate stone carvings and creeping ivy under a dark blue night sky. As the camera crosses the threshold, the outdoor chill gives way to the amber glow of flaming torches that illuminate marble floors and stone walls. The scene then expands into a grand hall where students in dark robes traverse a bifurcated staircase, before the camera finally pushes forward toward a massive ornate crest mounted on the far wall.
